productDisplayName: New Balance MW631 Men Others Walking Black Sports Shoes
description: A slip resistant walking shoe specifically designed for service environments, this shoe from new balance features the Abzorb heel and forefoot, N-Grip outsole and leather upper for absolute comfort and style. Upper Premium leather and textile upper for style Contrast stitch detailing for extra durability Midsole ABZORB cushioning in both heel and forefoot for exceptional shock absorption Outsole N-DURANCE rubber compound outsole for maximum durability in high-wear areas. Shoe care Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
